title: polystichum maximowiczii
intro: Polystichum maximowiczii, also known as the Japanese holly fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Polystichum maximowiczii is typically used as a tea or decoction, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a component of various formulas.
